messages.content:
Describe the potential impact of the vulnerability on affected systems.

Possible denial of service due to out of memory while processing RRC and NAS OTA message in Snapdragon Auto, Snapdragon Industrial IOT, Snapdragon Mobile

The impact of this vulnerability could lead to system unavailability or crashes, as the out-of-memory condition prevents proper processing of critical OTA messages, resulting in a Denial of Service (DoS) scenario.
